query_normalized: predicting the impact of impurities on the superconductivity of magnesium diboride materials science
rationale: The paper investigates how Cr impurities suppress superconductivity in BaFe₂₋ₓNiₓAs₂, providing same‑mechanism evidence (impurity‑induced pair‑breaking) relevant to predicting impurity impacts on superconductivity, even though the host material differs from MgB₂ (acceptance category a).
